allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('2026 Global Rev.01.xlsx', data_only=True\); print\('Sheets:', wb.sheetnames\); ws = wb['Staff Training']; rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\); print\('First row \(headers\):', rows[0]\); print\('Row count:', len\(rows\)\); print\('Sample row:', rows[1] if len\(rows\) > 1 else None\)")
